creator: eric.devolder@gmail.com
text:
Thank you, Yuri.

Not sure if you have committed your changes yet to the repository. I haven't checked out the tree yet, I'm assuming you don't post all your patches in the ticket.

I have received a couple of failed builds notifications from the package build server, on top of 11.4 ( amd64 and i386). These are all related to the version of OpenSSL available on the base system (likely <1.1.1e). Restoring to the initial setup should allow the build to pass, hopefully.

http://beefy10.nyi.freebsd.org/data/114i386-default/338d8ba0f777/logs/pkcs11-tools-2.3.0.log

http://beefy9.nyi.freebsd.org/data/114amd64-default/338d8ba0f777/logs/pkcs11-tools-2.3.0.log

Regards,

Eric
